niche: WorthScan student mini fridge resale valuation

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a WorthScan post for a student mini fridge listing during move-out resale season.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Check size, brand, freezer compartment, smell/cleanliness risk, pickup timing, and three local student resale comps.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Use only manually reviewed trend examples. No social scraping or automated account actions.

trend_examples.hook: Move-out deals are not all deals
trend_examples.notes: Seasonal hook creates urgency without claiming a platform trend.

trend_examples.hook: Check this before buying a used mini fridge
trend_examples.notes: Checklist framing fits a five-slide carousel.

trend_examples.hook: The pickup hassle changes the price
trend_examples.notes: Hassle-cost reveal gives the post a practical payoff.

notes: External calls and browser UI are disabled.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan this mini fridge before move-in week
slides.visual_direction: Show the listing photo, asking price, and size claim.

slides.on_screen_text: Check brand, size, freezer, and cleanliness
slides.visual_direction: Use detail crops for label, interior, shelves, and freezer compartment.
Show comp cards from local marketplace notes.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract smell, missing shelves, and pickup hassle
slides.visual_direction: Highlight practical risks students forget before pickup.

slides.on_screen_text: Worth range: fair deal or dorm tax
slides.visual_direction: Show range, confidence, and a comment prompt.

output_requirements.caption: Is this mini fridge a campus deal or dorm tax? Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan gives an estimate, not a guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: Mini fridges spike around move-in week, so do not judge by the first listing. Check size, brand, freezer compartment, smell and shelf risk, compare three local student listings, then subtract pickup hassle before naming the range.
posting_notes: Confirm the listing date and pickup location manually.
Do not include seller contact details in visuals.
Use a value range and a disclaimer.

qa_notes: Student resale comps must be manually checked.
